Non-binding term sheet (Hong Kong) — proposed strategic cooperation and possible acquisition.
Parties: Blue Kestrel Holdings Limited (HKEX-listed issuer, stock code X1234, fictional) and Jade Harbor Capital LPF (Hong Kong limited partnership fund).
Target: Cobalt Drift Robotics Limited (Hong Kong private company) to be designated as a strategic subsidiary.
Structure: purchase of approximately 55% of the issued shares via share purchase agreement and shareholders’ agreement, subject to due diligence and LR compliance.
Consideration: tbd, subject to independent valuation and fairness opinion; no public offer of securities will be made.
Regulatory: classification to be assessed under HKEX Listing Rules Ch.14; connected transaction analysis under Ch.14A not expected; SFO Part XIVA disclosure obligations noted.
Approvals: independent shareholders’ approval if major transaction; no SFC authorization of products required; competition/merger filings not applicable.
MAC/MAE: no material adverse change clause will operate at term sheet stage; any MAE definition in long-form will exclude general market/industry indices and force majeure.
Documentation: target documents include share purchase agreement, shareholders’ agreement, and transitional services schedule; draft board memo and circular templates to be prepared.
Embargo/timing: historical internal embargo ended on 2023-11-30 18:00 HKT; any announcement will follow LR 13.09 and Takeovers Code guidance as applicable.
Funding: internal resources and vendor financing contemplated; no new shares to be issued without prior HKEX consultation.
public/stale references: see HKEX Listing Rules (public website) and SFC publications; invalid sample identifiers: “ISIN ZZ-FAKE-000000”, “deal ref TS-000-XYZ”.
lower-case pm note: todo — set up data room, align with auditors, prepare ir faq, book team spa day after sign-off.
contacts: use role mailbox ir@bluekestrel.example or enquiries@sfc.example; please do not include personal data in replies.
